title: 📊 My Health
noDataWeight: No data. Add your first weight!
noDataBP: No measurements. Add your first blood pressure!
guestNotice: Sign in to track your health
disclaimer: ⚠️ This information is indicative and does not replace medical advice. When in doubt, contact your healthcare provider.

glucoseLow.title: Low blood sugar
glucoseLow.message: Low blood sugar detected. If you feel unwell, take fast sugar (juice, honey) and contact your healthcare provider.

glucoseSurveillance.title: Blood sugar to monitor
glucoseSurveillance.message: This reading is slightly above normal. Record it and mention it at your next appointment.

glucoseHigh.title: High blood sugar
glucoseHigh.message: High blood sugar. Mention it to your healthcare provider promptly.

glucoseVeryHigh.title: Very high blood sugar
glucoseVeryHigh.message: Very high blood sugar. Contact your healthcare provider quickly.

bpPreHyp.title: Blood pressure to monitor
bpPreHyp.message: Your blood pressure is slightly above normal. Record it and mention it at your next appointment.

bpHigh.title: High blood pressure
bpHigh.message: High blood pressure. Mention it to your healthcare provider at your next appointment.

bpSevere.title: Very high blood pressure
bpSevere.message: Very high blood pressure. Contact your healthcare provider without delay — risk of pre-eclampsia.

bpLow.title: Low blood pressure
bpLow.message: Low blood pressure. Rest, hydrate, and tell your doctor if it persists.

weightLossRapid.title: Significant weight loss
weightLossRapid.message: Significant weight loss detected. Contact your doctor if you are not eating well or have severe nausea.

weightVariation.title: Large weight change
weightVariation.message: The change since your last entry is large. Please double-check the value before saving.
